import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items


def test_filter_expensive_items_with_string_price():
    """Test that function handles string prices correctly without crashing."""
    items = [
        {'name': 'A', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'C', 'price': 50}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    assert result == [{'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}], "Should filter items correctly even when price is a string"
